TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Knights of Avalon Faction.

Translations.Comment: 阿瓦隆 (Avalon) kept as proper noun. Classic fantasy realm reference.
民兵 (militia) = citizen soldiers. 剑 = sword.
农民 = peasants. 暴民 = mob/rabble. Untrained levies.
戟 = halberd (polearm). Militia armed with pole weapons.
学徒 = aspirant/trainee. Young warriors in training.
骑 = mounted. 射手 = archer/hunter. Light cavalry archers.
宣誓 = sworn/oath-bound. Elite knights with sacred vows.
猎犬 = hunting/war dogs. Used as beast units in battle.
猎人 = hunters. Skilled scouts and ranged troops.
投石机 = trebuchet/catapult (stone-throwing machine). Technical siege term.
长弓 = longbow. Elite ranged troops famous for archery skill.
国王卫队 = King's Guard. Elite warriors serving as royal bodyguards.
天马 = celestial/pegasus horse (mythological). Flying cavalry unit.
鹰狮 = gryphon hybrid. Fantasy creature name for game consistency.
天马 = celestial/pegasus horse. Mythological creature name.
独角兽 = unicorn (single-horned beast). Magical pure creature.
圣女 = holy maiden/priestess. Divine warrior blessed by the gods.
圣骑士 = holy knight/paladin. Universal term for righteous champion.
